title: microgramma rosmarinifolium
intro: Microgramma rosmarinifolium, also known as the rosmary fern or Brazilian tree fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Microgramma rosmarinifolium include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Microgramma rosmarinifolium is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion, and it may also be used in herbal tinctures and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
